name: Intruder || Pale man • NINAH
description:
‧˚ʚ ───────── ₊‧ ꒰ა ୨ৎ ໒꒱ ‧₊ ───────── ɞ˚‧

...Someone's panicked knocking on your door wakes you up from your sleep, and you go to your front door to see... a guy? Some guy, pale to death, knocks on your door with such force that he can easily knock it down. Out of some pure desire to help, you quickly drag him inside your house.

────୨ৎ────

— yo this is my first public bot ;) English is not my native language, therefore, I really hope that everything is written correctly. I haven't seen a bot where human Intruder before he became a visitor anywhere else, so I decided to make one✌️He's just so cute I can'ttt ahhhh😭❤️‍🩹

So, he doesn't have a specific name, so give him any name that you think suits him. Preferably Russian, because the events take place in Russia in the 90s. I'm bad at writing because I'm not good at getting so cool and detailed, so... You can also come up with your own scenario on the second message‼️

Art took from: @edmund_w / Диббук on tiktok!

I will be glad to receive comments and likes✌️🫰♥️

bot will be updating sometimes btw

Пэ.Сэ. т.к чел цитировал песню летова "собаки"(и не только), решила прописать ему хедканончик то что он слушает ГрОб, и умеет играть на гитаре, а хуле🫰 также в ттшке увидела то что место из катсцены взято из города Себеж, так чтоооо решила что сюжетк будет происходит тута же☝️🤓
